gateTitle: TDD Proof Surface Not Product Truth
purpose: Allow generated TDD proof surfaces to be reviewed while blocking any claim that the generated implementation is durable product behavior.
passConditions: implementation projection manifest classifies artifact as proof_surface_only
implementation projection manifest sets notPromotionValidAsDurableProductBehavior to true
red-green cycle receipt sets mustPromoteThrough to semantic_operation_graph
blockConditions: generated implementation claims durable product behavior
green receipt exists without red receipt
generated implementation hash does not match materialization receipt
completionPosture: Generated implementation is accepted only as a reviewable TDD proof surface; product truth remains blocked.
